message:
feat(session): add fleet session manager with aggregation and FDR budgets

Multi-host session schema with per-host summaries, cross-host recurring
pattern detection, deterministic aggregation, and fleet-wide FDR/alpha
safety budget allocation. 9 tests.

Closes: process_triage-hc7.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
